definition: Something chaotic, absurd, or iconic. Originally from the 'Skibidi Toilet' YouTube series.
example: That entrance was so skibidi, everyone turned around.

definition: Charisma or charm, especially in flirting. Short for 'charisma.'
example: He's got unspoken rizz — didn't even say a word and she was interested.

definition: An independent, lone-wolf personality. The sigma grindset is about self-reliance and hustle.
example: He ate lunch alone by choice — total sigma move.

definition: Exclamation of surprise or admiration, often about someone's appearance. Derived from 'god damn.'
example: GYATT! Did you see that fit?

definition: A mythical cursed place where bizarre things happen. Used to describe anything weird or unhinged.
example: A squirrel stole my sandwich — only in Ohio.

definition: Suspicious or shady. Popularized by Among Us.
example: Why are you being so sus right now?

definition: No lie, for real, I'm being serious.
example: That was the best pizza I've ever had, no cap.

definition: Extremely good, usually about food but can apply to anything.
example: This mac and cheese is BUSSIN.

definition: To do something exceptionally well. To absolutely crush it.
example: You slayed that presentation — everyone was shook.

definition: Okay, agreed, sounds good. An affirmation.
example: Wanna grab food? Bet.

definition: Win. Used to celebrate a victory or good outcome.
example: Got an A on the test — massive W.

definition: Loss. Used to describe a failure or embarrassing moment.
example: Tripped in front of your crush? That's an L.

definition: When someone has consumed so much internet content that their humor and vocabulary are permanently altered.
example: If you understood that sentence, you have brainrot.

definition: Someone who seems to lack independent thought, like a non-player character in a video game.
example: He just follows whatever everyone else does — total NPC behavior.
origin: Gaming terminology applied to real life

definition: Acting like the protagonist of a movie. Living life dramatically and unapologetically.
example: She walked in with her coffee like she was the main character.

definition: Delusional but in a self-aware, manifesting kind of way. 'Delulu is the solulu.'
example: She thinks she'll marry that celebrity — delulu is the solulu.

definition: A personal phase or period of life defined by a vibe or focus.
example: I'm in my villain era — no more people-pleasing.

definition: A sudden feeling of disgust or turn-off about someone.
example: He chewed with his mouth open — instant ick.

definition: Your personal energy or vibe points. Can be gained or lost based on actions.
example: He tripped but played it off smooth — +1000 aura.

definition: To be doing something impressive. 'Let him cook' means let someone continue what they're doing.
example: Don't interrupt him — let him cook.

definition: Absolutely nailed it. Did something perfectly.
example: She ate that performance and left no crumbs.

definition: When a reply gets more likes than the original post, indicating the original take was bad.
example: Your take is so bad you're about to get ratioed.

definition: Average, mediocre, nothing special.
example: Everyone hyped that movie but honestly it was mid.

definition: Taking a portion of someone's food. Named after streamer Fanum who'd take bites of others' meals.
example: I'm collecting fanum tax on those fries.

definition: A jawline exercise involving pressing your tongue to the roof of your mouth. Also used as a meme pose.
example: He's been mewing all day trying to get a sharper jawline.
origin: Dr. Mike Mew orthodontic technique → TikTok meme

definition: Optimizing your physical appearance through various methods (skincare, gym, style, etc).
example: He started his looksmaxxing journey and glow-up was real.

definition: Outshining someone in appearance or presence. Making them look worse by comparison.
example: He walked in and mogged everyone at the party.

definition: For real. Used to emphasize sincerity.
example: That test was impossible, FR.

definition: On God. Swearing something is true.
example: ONG that was the funniest thing I've ever seen.

definition: Having a bold opinion you don't care if others disagree with. Unapologetically yourself.
example: She wore crocs to prom — based.

definition: A lie or to lie. Opposite of 'no cap.'
example: You said you did the homework? That's cap.

definition: Extremely good, hot, amazing.
example: Your new shoes are fire 🔥

definition: Secretly, subtly, or to a moderate degree.
example: I lowkey love that song but won't admit it.

definition: Openly, obviously, very much so. Opposite of lowkey.
example: I highkey need a nap right now.
origin: Internet slang as opposite of lowkey

definition: Assessing someone's energy or mood, sometimes physically.
example: Random vibe check — how are you doing today?

definition: Nailed it. Did exactly what was needed and more.
example: Her outfit for the theme party? She understood the assignment.

definition: It has the energy/vibe of something. Used to describe aesthetic or mood.
example: That outfit is giving main character energy.

definition: When something lives in your mind constantly without you wanting it to.
example: That song has been living rent free in my head all week.

definition: Something is so funny you've metaphorically died laughing.
example: The way he fell — I'm DEAD 💀

definition: Caught red-handed with undeniable evidence.
example: You said you weren't eating my food but I caught you in 4K.

definition: Encouragement to keep speaking your truth or doing your thing passionately.
example: She started roasting the teacher — go off queen!

definition: Someone who does way too much for a person they like without getting anything in return.
example: He bought her flowers every day for a month — certified simp.

definition: An extremely devoted fan. Can be used as a verb (to stan).
example: I stan this artist — every album is a masterpiece.

definition: End of discussion. Emphasis on a final statement.
example: She is the best player on the team, periodt.

definition: Acceptable, understandable, respectable.
example: You don't like chocolate? Honestly, valid.

definition: A fictional substance you inhale to cope with a loss or bad situation.
example: He's on copium thinking his team will still make playoffs.

definition: Go outside. You've been online too long.
example: You're arguing about fictional characters at 3am — go touch grass.

definition: Excessively praising or flattering someone, often undeservedly.
example: Stop glazing the teacher, we all know you want extra credit.

definition: In meme context: being on the verge of something but holding back. Delaying gratification.
example: I'm edging on buying that — one more sale and I'm done.

definition: Viral catchphrase/sound from a street interview that became a massive meme.
example: She really said hawk tuah and became famous overnight.

definition: Modest, reserved, and mindful. Went viral as an ironic/genuine descriptor.
example: Very demure, very mindful, very cutesy of you.

definition: A really good song that makes you want to move.
example: This new track is an absolute bop.

definition: Short form of 'understood the assignment' — nailed it perfectly.
example: The costume? Understood.

definition: Something embarrassing or uncomfortable to witness.
example: His dance at the talent show was pure cringe.

definition: To throw something with force. Also an exclamation of excitement.
example: He yeeted his phone across the room after that text.

definition: Greatest Of All Time.
example: Messi is the GOAT, no debate.

definition: Something feels uniquely special in a particular context.
example: Music at 3am hits different.

definition: Something is extremely funny — it's sending you to another dimension of laughter.
example: That meme is absolutely sending me 😂

definition: Subtle disrespect or indirect insult.
example: Did she just throw shade at my outfit?

definition: Gossip, drama, or truth.
example: Spill the tea — what happened at the party?

definition: Looking extremely good. On point.
example: Your makeup is snatched today!

definition: Absolutely loving something. Finding extreme joy.
example: I am LIVING for this performance.

definition: To show off. Can be humble flex (subtle) or hard flex (obvious).
example: Nice humble flex posting your grades like that.
